channel.title: Arseni Katsela :: Relearn Everything
channel.description: Summary yang di buat dari channel Arseni Katsela

item.title: 5 Tiny Habits to INSANE Art Progress
item.description: Summary from video of Arseni Katsela with titled 5 Tiny Habits to INSANE Art Progress Input Detox There 2 type of content: Deep Content Shallow Content Block shallow stuff Focus on true learning The Anti Practice The key is find something boredom without your phone The Permadeath Timer Set a timer for 10 min session and if there is a tiny distraction you have to start all over again Auto-Solve Switch The Rule: When you are stuck, you have to physically leave the room and do anything mindless Source Code Method Look for the sketch and not the final result Try to copy the sketch construction line and gesture and try to come out with the detail on your own
